landing.hero_desc: Every day, 50+ new AI products launch across X, GitHub, Product Hunt and 10+ channels. 90% of AI directories are full of dead products. AI Radar automatically discovers, validates, and tracks real, active AI products with our exclusive 4D verification system.
landing.cta_free: Start Free — No credit card required
landing.pain_title: Are you also facing these problems?
landing.pain_subtitle: Every day, AI entrepreneurs waste hours on bad information
landing.pain_1_desc: Browsing 10+ platforms daily to find AI products, wasting time and still missing important ones.
landing.pain_2_desc: 90% of AI directories are full of 404 pages and zombie products, wasting decision time.
landing.pain_3_desc: Same product has different names across platforms, making it impossible to build a complete competitor profile.
landing.features_title: One platform for all AI product intelligence
landing.feature_discovery_desc: Crawls 10+ channels (X, GitHub, Product Hunt, etc.) to discover 50+ new AI products daily.
landing.feature_verification_desc: Cross-validates each product using data freshness, multi-source confirmation, engagement signals, and technical viability.
landing.feature_alerts_desc: Push updates to Feishu, DingTalk, Slack, Telegram, Discord, Teams — your choice of platform and frequency.
landing.feature_comparison_desc: Compare up to 5 products side-by-side with confidence scores, tech stack, pricing, and growth data.
landing.verification_desc: Every AI product judgment comes with a confidence score (0-100%) backed by verifiable evidence.
landing.user_entrepreneur_text: "I used to spend 2 hours every morning checking X, GitHub, Product Hunt, and Chinese platforms. Now AI Radar pushes me a daily digest of 5-8 validated new AI products matching my focus areas. I found my main competitor 3 weeks earlier than before."
landing.user_investor_text: "We use AI Radar to track emerging AI startups across all channels. The confidence score helps us filter noise. We've discovered 3 promising pre-seed companies through AI Radar that we would have missed otherwise."
landing.user_developer_text: "When building an AI product, I need to know what tech stack others use, what APIs are popular, and which open-source projects are gaining traction. AI Radar's trend analysis and tech stack compatibility check are incredibly useful."
landing.pricing_subtitle: Start free, upgrade as you grow
landing.cta_ready: Ready to stop wasting time on dead AI directories?
landing.cta_join: Join thousands of AI entrepreneurs who trust AI Radar for product intelligence.
